[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110000 3
1 1011110 5
2 1100100 3
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0011100 3
7 1100000 2

01 0011111 5
12 1111001 5
23 1011110 5 match 1

45 1111111 a
56 1110001 4
67 1011111 6
70 1100111 5

71 1111111 a
